title: Codex adapter path recurrence fixed
body: Root cause found in local tooling as well as config: Codex resolves agents.<name>.config_file relative to .codex/config.toml, but agent-tools and validate-subagents fixtures were treating those values as repo-root-relative. Updated config values to agents/<name>.toml, made resolver and validation resolve via .codex/config.toml, and added negative Vitest coverage for the doubled .codex/.codex path. Verification green: agent-tools:test, test:root-scripts, subagents:check, portability:check, agent-tools:lint, agent-tools type-check, targeted Prettier check, and codex-reviewer-resolve code-reviewer.
